scripts.dev: bun run dev:migrate:fast && bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.dev:migrate:fast: set -a && . apps/web/.env && [ -f apps/web/.env.local ] && . apps/web/.env.local; set +a && bun scripts/dev-migrate.mjs
scripts.dev:migrate: set -a && . apps/web/.env && [ -f apps/web/.env.local ] && . apps/web/.env.local; set +a && bun run --cwd packages/business/auth db:migrate && bun run --cwd products/menu db:migrate
scripts.postinstall: [ -n "${CI:-}" ] && exit 0; mkdir -p .git/hooks && cp scripts/git-hooks/pre-commit .git/hooks/pre-commit && cp scripts/git-hooks/commit-msg .git/hooks/commit-msg && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-commit .git/hooks/commit-msg && echo '✓ git hooks installed (pre-commit: actionlint on .github/workflows/, commit-msg: conventional)' || true
